title: User List and Status
description: Tenant-scoped user list showing user identity and VistA user status. User management spans platform identity and VistA File 200 (NEW PERSON). Initial posture is read-only mirror of VistA user data. Write operations for user provisioning require governed API contracts (future). Platform does not own VistA File 200; it mirrors read-only.

dataSources.description: VistA user records — read-only mirror for display.
Platform identity and user governance data.
